description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-structured-list

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-structured-list/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Row padding, header, dividers, selection. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Table or grid semantics. Column headers. Row selection announcements.
3. **Functionality** — Header row. Data rows. Selection (single/multi). Columns. Responsive.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Row striping. Responsive.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Rendering. Selection. Keyboard. Responsive.
8. **Storybook** — Basic. Selectable. With actions. Responsive.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Entity listing. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-structured-list
